cognitive_bridge.summary: Survival and professionalization of the Mem4ristor architecture. Neutralized a hostile scientific audit (Reviewer 2) and reached industry-grade repository standards after a dual-audit (Antigravity + ManusAI).
milestones: Scientific validation: Proven Effective Spectral Gap (L_eff) for thermodynamic stability.
Causal proof: Transfer Entropy confirms information flow from Normal nodes to Heretics.
Professional Cleanup: Unified versioning (4.0.0), fixed all example imports, archived dead code.
Innovation: Established Project Guardian (autonomous maintenance skill).

context_for_next_ai.branch_strategy: Main is for V4 Stable. Use 'research/v5-cognitive-exploration' for new features.

context_for_next_ai.pending_tasks: Update LaTeX preprints (Paper 1/2) with V4 proofs AFTER receiving initial researcher feedback.
